title: Smooth Journey Forge
description: A lightweight optimization modpack for Forge/NeoForge.
body:
<details>
<summary>If you want to install the Fabric version of this modpack:
</summary>
  
[Smooth Journey](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey)

[Smooth Journey(Lite Version)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey(lite-version))

</details>
<details>
<summary>If you want to install the lite version of this modpack:</summary>

[Smooth Journey Forge(Lite Version)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smooth-journey-forge-(lite-version))

</details>

---

This modpack tries to optimize Minecraft by using some optimized mods,while adding some utility mods.

In version 1.8.9, you can use features that enhance the PVP experience, 
such as CPS display and status effect display, 
as well as features that improve the multiplayer experience, 
such as chat translation. 
There are also mods that improve the vanilla game experience, 
such as [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [What Am I Looking At](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila).

No mods that change the gameplay have been added,so it can be joined to any vanilla server.

It's enjoyable for me to make a modpack.I hope you enjoy it.


Mods from CurseForge:\
[Waila](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila)
